input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IC.4.4.5 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ic.4.4.5
            TITLE: if three sensors are used, then in the case of a tps failure, any two tpss that agree within 10%

            CONTENT:
            rule IC.4.4.5: If three sensors are used, then in the case of a TPS failure, any two TPSs that agree within 10%
IC.4.4.5 If three sensors are used, then in the case of a TPS failure, any two TPSs that agree within 10% 
throttle position may be used to define the throttle position target and the 3rd TPS may be 
ignored.

final_answer: If three sensors are used, then in the case of a TPS failure, any two TPSs that agree within 10% throttle position may be used to define the throttle position target and the 3rd TPS may be ignored.
